author: Kostya Struga
description: Track Readwise reading progress, highlights, heatmaps, and reading inbox notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Kostya Struga
manifest.description: Track reading activity, manage Reader books and tags, import files and URLs, and turn highlights into linked notes.
manifest.name: Readwise Reading Tracker

name: Readwise Reading Tracker

releases.author: strug
releases.description:
This release expands the plugin from a reading activity dashboard into a more complete Readwise Reader workflow inside Obsidian.

## Reader imports

- Save web pages to Reader directly from Obsidian using a URL.
- Upload EPUB and PDF books.
- Import HTML, TXT, and Markdown files.
- Add an optional title before saving.
- Assign existing Reader tags or create new tags during import.
- Sign in to Reader when an authenticated upload is required.
- Automatically synchronize imported documents with the local tracker.

## Reading Heatmap integration

- Clicking a book in the Reading Heatmap now filters the heatmap to show activity for that book.
- The same action automatically opens the Readwise Book Highlights view in the right sidebar.
- The selected book is synchronized between the dashboard and highlights panel.
- Existing sidebar views are reused and focused instead of opening duplicate panels.

## Book and tag management

- Add tags to the selected Reader document without leaving Obsidian.
- Choose from existing Reader tags or enter a new one.
- Remove a book directly from its details card.
- Book deletion is synchronized with Readwise instead of affecting local tracker data only.
- Local book data and reading activity are removed only after Readwise confirms the deletion.
- A confirmation dialog clearly warns that deletion is permanent.
- Authentication and deletion failures leave local data untouched.

## Highlights workflow

- Improved navigation between dashboard books and their linked highlight notes.
- Book selection automatically refreshes the visible highlights.
- Expanded highlight state is reset when switching books.
- Existing actions for opening highlights and creating inbox notes remain available.

## Interface improvements

- Added an import menu for URL and file uploads.
- The import menu now closes when clicking outside it.
- Added drag-and-drop file selection.
- Added loading, authentication, success, and error states for imports.
- Added a compact delete icon to the selected-book card.
- The delete icon uses a subtle red border and icon on hover without a solid red fill.
- Added localized English and Russian labels for all new actions and dialogs.
